name: io.github.cloudinary/environment-config-mcp
title: Cloudinary Environment Config
description: Manage Cloudinary environment configuration including upload presets, metadata fields, streaming profiles, and various settings.

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Your Cloudinary cloud name. Find it in your Cloudinary Dashboard.

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDINARY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Cloudinary API key. Found in Dashboard > Settings > Access Keys.

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Your Cloudinary API secret. Found in Dashboard > Settings > Access Keys.
